input: Summarize: Northfield Plastics LLC requests a $12.5M revolving credit facility. DSCR 1.42x. Primary risk: customer concentration, top customer is 38% of revenue.
Summarize: Harbor Logistics Inc., $8.0M term loan for fleet expansion, collateralized by rolling stock at 78% LTV. Covenant: minimum fixed charge coverage 1.20x.
Summarize: Caldwell Dental Group, $3.2M practice acquisition loan. Seller financing covers 15%. Guarantor net worth $4.1M.
Summarize: Mesa Verde Hospitality, $22M construction loan for a 120-key hotel. Completion guaranty from sponsor. Risk: market RevPAR declined 6% YoY.
Summarize: Pinnacle Ag Supply, $5.5M seasonal line, borrowing base of 80% eligible AR plus 50% inventory. Prior year peak utilization 92%.
Summarize: Brightline Medical Devices, $9.75M equipment financing, 84-month amortization. Risk flag: pending FDA 510(k) clearance on the product line the equipment supports.
Summarize: Two Rivers Brewing, $1.8M expansion loan. DSCR 1.15x, below policy minimum of 1.25x; mitigant: 25% cash collateral pledge.
Summarize: Quarry Ridge Storage, $14.3M refinance of stabilized self-storage, 91% occupancy, debt yield 9.8%. Exception requested: 30-year amortization vs 25-year policy.
Summarize: Cedar Point Manufacturing, $6.4M equipment line. Three-year average EBITDA $2.1M. Risk: single-plant operation with no redundancy.
Summarize: Lakeshore Senior Living, $18.6M acquisition of a 90-unit assisted-living facility. Stabilized occupancy 88%. Regulatory risk: state licensure transfer pending.
Summarize: Granite State Tooling, $4.9M working-capital revolver. Borrowing base advances 85% of eligible receivables. Top-three customer concentration 54%.
Summarize: Sunbelt Cold Storage, $27M construction-to-perm loan for a refrigerated warehouse. Pre-leasing 65%. Sponsor co-invest 20% equity.
Summarize: Ironwood Recycling, $3.6M term loan for a baler upgrade. Commodity-price exposure on baled cardboard. DSCR 1.31x.
Summarize: Coastal Marine Services, $7.2M vessel-refinance facility. Collateral: two offshore supply vessels, 70% LTV. Charter contracts expire within 18 months.
Summarize: Heartland Grain Co-op, $11.4M seasonal grain-storage line. Members' equity supports 30% of the facility. Basis risk on stored bushels.
Summarize: Vantage Data Centers, $42M mezzanine tranche behind a $160M senior facility. Tenant: a single hyperscaler on a 15-year lease. Risk: tenant-concentration and subordination.
